task: Extend promotion gates, scorecard, and promoter to score rich Decision PPO TradeDecision quality from ExecutionAgent telemetry (not just P&L/drawdown)
summary: PromotionGates now understands full structured TradeDecisions. New RichExecutionAnalyzer consumes logs/execution_feedback.jsonl + runtime/execution_reports/ to compute trailing_success_rate, partials R-multiple uplift, risk sizing adherence (requested % vs actual), decision-to-fill latency, execution fidelity. Rich gates only enforce for decision_ppo candidates (zero impact on legacy simple_action). Promoter, model_evaluator, and registry paths pass execution_type=decision_ppo metadata explicitly. Scorecards and audits now carry rich_execution_metrics.
key_deliverables: Python/registry/promotion_gates.py: extended with RichExecutionAnalyzer + _run_rich_execution_gates() + new DEFAULT_GATES thresholds (min_execution_quality etc). Integrated into evaluate() flow.

Python/model_evaluator.py: enriched training_metrics + val_report with execution_type, uses_rich_decision, and auto-invoked rich_execution_metrics for decision_ppo candidates. Strict gates now surface rich data.

scripts/promote_candidate_to_paper.py: cleaned duplicate keys, reinforced execution_type=decision_ppo in all audit_entry / start_meta / handoff / MQL5 guidance / harness launch. Explicit rich_gates + telemetry sources in every promotion record. run_gates_on_candidate now attaches rich metrics.
Inline docs + updated module docstrings in gates + promoter + evaluator
rich_metrics_computed: trailing_success_rate (favorable SL moves from TrailingSpec variants: breakeven_only, atr, step_trail etc)
risk_sizing_adherence_rate (SizeSpec modes: risk_pct_equity, fixed_lots etc vs fill reality)
execution_quality_score (composite fidelity for PPO learning attribution)
how_it_works: When scorecard or env has execution_type=decision_ppo (default for new promoted via promoter), PromotionGates + analyzer parse telemetry (robust to sparse early data, conservative defaults). Failures surface as rich_*_fail reasons. Paper harness / canary runs populate the signals for subsequent gate runs (e.g. re-eval or champion_cycle).
promoter_metadata_contract: Always includes: execution_type, uses_rich_decision, rich_gates, rich_execution_telemetry_sources in audit + paper_harness_start.json + handoff_status + PIPELINE_DECISIONS. MQL5 guidance updated for rich specs.
compatibility: Legacy paths (simple_action) never see new gates or failures. All prior UNIFY-GATES behavior preserved.
next_steps_for_consumers: After paper harness run on decision_ppo candidate: re-invoke promoter or champion_cycle to apply rich gates on populated telemetry. TUI / monitor_tui / api_server surface rich_execution_metrics. RetrainingTrigger can weight on poor rich exec quality.
docs_updated: Module docstrings + comments; see also docs/DECISION_EXECUTION_ARCHITECTURE.md + DECISION_PPO.md for context (rich TradeDecision + ExecutionAgent already documented)
agent_status_refresh: Run scripts/swarm_status.py or monitor_tui to surface in TUI. Status also echoed to PIPELINE_DECISIONS.jsonl on promoter runs.
